# query_feature_zoo_window_tr { #natural_features.query_feature_zoo_window_tr }

```python
query_feature_zoo_window_tr(
    zoo,
    grid,
    *,
    run_index,
    t_start_s,
    t_end_s,
    relative_to_run=True,
    method='mean',
    output_time='absolute',
)
```

Apply run-aware TR query to every feature in a collection.
